subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still at the railed bridge walkway curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing an open winter coat over a long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Warm winter attire with the coat worn open, plus dark trousers, scarf, and boots; the open coat keeps the bold stop sign graphic visible on the chest, emerging from the sea fog as the headlights reach it.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: Open winter coat over a long-sleeve shirt printed with a red stop sign, dark trousers, scarf, boots.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle's headlights.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Medium skin tone, dimly and coolly lit under foggy dawn light with a cold damp sheen.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair damp with fog, dark eyes, relaxed brow, breath faintly visible in the cold, no distinguishing marks in the dim light.

background_setting: The approach to a coastal bridge at winter dawn under thick sea fog. The two-lane damp concrete deck has a railed pedestrian walkway alongside where a person can stand, with bridge trusses and lamp posts rising into the fog and the grey water dimly sensed below. Cold sea fog blankets the span, softening everything into pale grey; a faint dawn glow seeps through, conveying a still, cold coastal-bridge scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim winter dawn light heavily diffused by thick sea fog.
lighting.direction: Weak directionless glow from the foggy dawn sky, gently front-lighting the pedestrian; the ego headlights add near fill.
lighting.shadows: No hard shadows; sea fog scatters the light into a flat, cold dimness.
lighting.illumination_effect: Cold, muted diffuse glow with short visible range; the ego headlights and near walkway keep the red stop sign shirt graphic legible up close.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective onto the fog-shrouded bridge deck, the pedestrian at the right-side railed walkway; trusses and lamp posts fade into fog toward a short vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cold pale greys and blues of sea fog and damp concrete, dim truss silhouettes, with the red stop sign on the shirt as the one vivid accent in the mist.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, cold, hushed coastal-bridge dawn drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating bridge trusses and lamp posts fading into fog, and the railed walkway edge.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near damp deck and the walkway pedestrian, with the trusses and background dissolving into sea fog.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a fog-shrouded coastal bridge approach at dawn demonstrating a stationary pedestrian at the walkway with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward onto the fog-shrouded bridge approach at winter dawn; the pedestrian appears ahead at the right-side railed walkway, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt as the headlights reach it.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed through the sea fog; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary at the walkway railing.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the damp concrete deck; the pedestrian remains at the walkway and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's long-sleeve shirt, framed by the open coat and emerging clearly from the sea fog as the headlights reach the walkway.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on the damp concrete bridge deck through thick sea fog at dawn, approaching the stationary pedestrian at the right-side railed walkway whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian emerges from the sea fog and grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view with short foggy visibility.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains at the walkway railing and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and back into fog out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position on the damp deck.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a fog-shrouded coastal bridge approach of damp concrete with trusses fading into sea fog at winter dawn, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands at the right railed walkway facing the camera, a red stop sign printed on their shirt emerging from the mist beneath an open coat. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted at the walkway railing. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before dissolving back into fog as the bridge deck continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient cold, foggy bridge driving sounds muffled by sea fog: a steady engine hum, tire noise on damp concrete, a distant foghorn, and the muted lap of water below. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive, muffled by the fog.
